prestazioni: Engine swap to a **M16A (1.6L DOHC VVT, 125hp stock)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve** for reduced lag and improved spool response. Supporting mods include a **Toda Racing forged piston set (8.5:1 compression)** and **Eagle H-beam connecting rods** to handle 300whp reliably.

Full **3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by Fujitsubo (Giken homologation)** with a **custom 50mm dual-exit muffler** for optimized scavenging and JDM-style tone. Pair with a **Sard 70mm throttle body** and **AEM 3.5bar MAP sensor** for precise boost control on the stock **M16A ECU reflashed via EcuTek ProECU** with a **custom 22psi boost map** and **550cc Denso injectors**.

**Tein Flex Z coilovers (Liana-specific valving)** with **Eibach Pro-Kit helper springs** for adjustable ride height (-30mm front, -25mm rear) and **Whiteline 22mm adjustable rear sway bar** to eliminate understeer. Braking upgraded to **DBA 4000 Series rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear)** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines** for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Liana Sedan widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated **Seibon carbon fiber lip**, and **OEM+ rear diffuser**) for a 50mm wider track and aggressive stance. Painted in **Nismo GT-R Pearl White (3-coat) with custom **Rays Gram Lights 57Xtreme 17x8 +35 wheels** (gunmetal finish) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 215/40/17 tires**.

**JDM-spec Liana sedan front end conversion** (2004-2007 facelift) with **Morimoto XB LED headlights (projector retrofit)**, **Depo Racing clear side markers**, and **custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon)** with **functional NACA ducts** for engine bay cooling. Rear features a **custom LED taillight overlay (V-LED 3157 bulbs)** and **Suzuki Sport rear badge delete**.

**Interior stripped and rebuilt with a **Bride Zeta III (Liana-specific brackets)** and **Takata Drift II harnesses (4-point)**. Dashboard modified with a **Defi Advance BF gauges (boost, oil pressure, water temp)** and **Sparco Pro2000 steering wheel (350mm, suede)**. Floor mats replaced with **WeatherTech DigitalFit custom-fit all-weather liners** and **custom sound deadening (Dynamat Xtreme)** for NVH reduction.
